notes: Update button no longer opens GitHub (2026-06). Clicking 「新版あり」 used to open the GitHub releases page (the manifest url failed the github-only origin allowlist and fell back to the repo). Now an online viewer simply reloads in place with a cache-buster to pull the freshest build (Cloudflare serves the latest), and a saved offline (file://) copy downloads the new HTML — neither bounces you out to GitHub. Includes v0.0.5–0.0.7: phone portrait support, mobile/iPad UI overlap fixes, larger tap targets, and 📦 object-add on iPad.
